name: Send File via Telegram
description: Sends a local file (image, document, etc.) to a Telegram chat using the Bot API. Use this when the user asks you to send, share, or upload a file to their Telegram. Automatically detects images (jpg, png, gif, webp) and sends them as photos; other files are sent as documents.

file_path.description: The absolute local path to the file to send (e.g., C:\Users\admin\Desktop\123.jpg)

caption.description: Optional caption text to display with the file.
